title: T-050 — UI parity: shifts, line detail, analytics hub and production settings
prompt:
# T-050 — UI parity: shifts, line detail, analytics hub and production settings

PRD/UX refs: SCR-08-08, SCR-08-09, SCR-08-10, SCR-08-11, MODAL-08-12..15

Goal: Build shift management, line detail, analytics hub and production settings surfaces.

Implementation details:
Use Next.js App Router Server Components by default, shadcn/ui components, next-intl keys, org-scoped data access, loading/empty/error states, and literal data-prototype-label markers matching _meta/prototype-labels/prototype-index-production.json. Closeout must include desktop screenshots and Playwright traces. Match other-screens.jsx:215-291,393-496,560-649; new-screens.jsx:212-478; modals.jsx:366-386,438-557,560-635. Shift actions use T-039/T-040; settings use T-045; line detail uses T-044 SSE and OEE snapshots.

Scope files:
- apps/web/app/production/shifts/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/production/analytics/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/production/settings/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/production/lines/[id]/page.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/other-screens.jsx:215-649
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/new-screens.jsx:212-478

Acceptance criteria:
1. Shift/settings/line/analytics screens render with prototype labels and URL-driven tabs
2. Shift end blocks unresolved gates and settings forms audit changes
3. Closeout includes screenshots for shifts, line detail, settings, analytics and trace

Evidence: include screenshots/artifacts and Playwright traces/artifacts for UI/E2E tasks; include API test output for backend tasks.
